_comment: High-value firm demand signals. Synthetic but modelled on real consulting-firm demand. 'acuteness' = how urgently unmet, 'recurrence' = how many client accounts show this demand, 'scarcity' = how few internal people can verifiably deliver it. These drive the 'prioritise X over Y' logic.

signals.label: AI / GenAI delivery (data + AI engineering)
signals.note: Most acute, most wanted. Huge latent supply of self-taught people, very few with certs or verifiable delivery.

signals.label: Security-cleared talent (SC/DV)
signals.note: Gated by clearance, not just skill. Long lead time to obtain.

signals.label: Specific regulatory experience (FS)
signals.note: Value spikes on specific named regimes (e.g. Consumer Duty, DORA) for specific accounts.
